chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1219 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 10-09-2025 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press instant Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
